description: Manage BreezeDoc e-signature and invoicing workflows across documents, templates, recipients, teams, invoices, and follow-ups.

novel_features.name: Invoice lifecycle
novel_features.description: Create, update, optionally send, and refetch BreezeDoc invoices as one structured agent workflow.

novel_features.name: Client workspace snapshot
novel_features.description: Collect a compact account snapshot across user, documents, templates, recipients, invoices, and optional teams.

novel_features.name: Document follow-up
novel_features.description: Inspect a document and its recipients, derive follow-up statuses, and optionally resend with explicit opt-in.

novel_features.name: Signature packet prep
novel_features.description: Prepare a signature packet from a template or raw document payload and optionally send it with explicit opt-in.

catalog_description: Manage BreezeDoc e-signature and invoicing workflows across documents, templates, recipients, teams, invoices, and follow-ups.
